ventureStages.no_idea_open_to_join: No own idea, open to joining

shared_vision.label: Shared vision
shared_vision.description: How important a similar direction for the company is to you.

commitment.label: Similar commitment
commitment.description: How important comparable effort and priority are to you.

skill_complementarity.label: Complementary skills
skill_complementarity.description: How much someone should complement you instead of bringing the same strengths.

venture_goal.label: Similar company ambition
venture_goal.description: How important it is that you think similarly about size, pace and ambition.

exit_logic.label: Exit logic
exit_logic.description: How important a similar feel for long-term building or a potential exit is.

availability.label: Availability
availability.description: How important it is that time and commitment fit well.

work_style.label: Working style
work_style.description: How important a similar day-to-day rhythm is to you.

execution_strength.label: Execution strength
execution_strength.description: How important it is that someone moves strongly into action.

location.label: Location and proximity
location.description: How important place, time zone or meeting in person are to you.

industry.label: Industry and interests
industry.description: How important overlap in market, topic or interest is to you.

communication.label: Trust and communication
communication.description: How important clear, reliable communication is to you.

index.title: Find a co-founder
index.subtitle: Create your search profile, set your priorities and get ready to discover fitting co-founder candidates.

missingProfile.label: No search profile yet
missingProfile.hint: Create a search profile first. You decide later when it becomes visible.

activeProfile.hint: Your profile is visible to logged-in Cofoundery users.

pausedProfile.hint: Your profile is currently not visible.

draftProfile.hint: Only you can see this profile.

profile.title: Create profile
profile.description: Show who you are, what you bring and what you are looking for.

priorities.title: Set priorities
priorities.description: Define what matters most to you in a co-founder.

suggestions.title: Receive suggestions
suggestions.description: Later, we suggest profiles that fit your priorities.

intro.title: Request intro
intro.description: If both sides are interested, you can start a first conversation.

matching.title: Start shared Cofoundery Matching
matching.description: After that, you can deepen the collaboration with the existing matching and workbook.

index.candidateHint: Sorted by your private priorities without showing them publicly.
index.emptyActiveText: We do not see fitting profiles right now. Check whether your advanced filters are too narrow, or come back later.
index.emptyInactiveText: Publish your search profile so we can better place matching profiles.
index.privacyText: Your private search priorities and assessment answers stay protected. Your profile only shows details you intentionally publish.

candidateCard.hint: Review the profile first. An intro flow comes as the next step.

profile.title: Your co-founder search profile
profile.subtitle: Create a profile for people who might build with you. You decide when it becomes visible.

status.activeHint: Logged-in Cofoundery users can see your profile.
status.pausedHint: Your profile is paused and not visible to others.
status.draftHint: Only you can see this profile.

messages.fallbackError: The action could not be completed right now.
messages.published: Your Discovery profile is now active.

publicProfile.title: What others may see
publicProfile.description: These details only become visible once you publish your profile.
publicProfile.headline: Headline
publicProfile.headlinePlaceholder: e.g. Product founder looking for a tech counterpart
publicProfile.bioPlaceholder: What you are working on, what you bring and what kind of collaboration you are looking for.
publicProfile.ownRolesHelp: What do you bring most strongly? Up to {count} roles.
publicProfile.ownRolesLimit: You reached the maximum number of own roles.
publicProfile.seekingRolesHelp: What kind of complement are you looking for in a co-founder? Up to {count} roles.
publicProfile.seekingRolesLimit: You reached the maximum number of roles you are looking for.
publicProfile.industriesHelp: Separate multiple terms with commas. Up to {count} terms.
publicProfile.industriesLimit: You reached the maximum number of industries/interests.

venture.title: What you are looking for right now
venture.description: Help others understand whether direction, pace and ambition fit well.
venture.commitment: How much room does founding have right now?
venture.goal: What do you want to build?

actions.publishHelp: When publishing, we save your current details and make your profile visible if everything is complete.
actions.publishIssues: Before your profile becomes visible, please add:

publishIssueItems.displayName: Give your search profile a name with at least 2 characters.
publishIssueItems.headline: Add a short headline so others can understand your focus.
publishIssueItems.ownRoles: Select at least one role you bring yourself.
publishIssueItems.seekingRoles: Select at least one role you are looking for in a co-founder.
publishIssueItems.availability: Add roughly how much time per week you can contribute.
publishIssueItems.commitment: Choose a commitment level before publishing your profile.
publishIssueItems.ventureStage: Choose where you currently are with your idea or search.
publishIssueItems.ventureGoal: Choose what kind of venture setup you are looking for.

preview.title: How others see your profile
preview.headlineFallback: A short headline about you and your search
preview.bioFallback: Briefly describe what you bring and what kind of collaboration you are looking for.
preview.privacy: Private search priorities are not shown here.

preferences.title: What matters to you in a co-founder
preferences.description: Choose up to {count} topics that really matter to you. 1 means “slightly important”, 5 means “very important”. Unselected topics stay private and count internally as 0.

assessment.title: Include Cofoundery Check
assessment.description: If you want, we later use your Cofoundery assessment results to generate better suggestions and conversation cues. Raw answers or internal evaluations are not shown on your profile.
assessment.checkboxHelp: This setting is private and does not appear on your public Discovery profile.
assessment.defaulted: For the beta phase, this private setting is preselected. Save your search priorities to keep it, or remove the checkmark.
assessment.missingBase: Answer the foundation questions first to include the Cofoundery Check.
assessment.inactive: Inactive: Your assessment results stay unused for Discovery.
assessment.active: Active: Cofoundery privately uses your Check signals for better Discovery suggestions and conversation cues.

filters.title: Advanced filters
filters.description: Use hard criteria sparingly. Too many must-haves can prevent good conversations.

intros.title: My intros
intros.subtitle: Here you can see who wants to meet you and which intros you requested. An accepted intro does not create a relationship, invitation or workbook.
intros.receivedEmpty: No received intro requests yet. Once someone finds your profile interesting, the request appears here.
intros.sentEmpty: You have not requested any intros yet. When a profile feels interesting, you can signal first interest on the profile page.
intros.profileHiddenText: The related profile is currently not publicly visible.
intros.acceptPlaceholder: What would you like to briefly send back?
intros.declinePlaceholder: You can reply briefly, but you do not have to.

detail.privacy: This profile only shows details the person intentionally published for Discovery. Private search priorities and assessment answers are not shown.
detail.emptyText: This Discovery profile is currently not publicly visible or does not exist.

intro.requestText: If the profile feels interesting, you can signal first interest. The other person decides whether they want to accept the intro.
intro.messagePlaceholder: What makes this profile interesting to you?
intro.messageHelp: Optional, maximum 600 characters. Share only what you intentionally want to send.
intro.acceptedText: You both signaled interest. Next, you can have a first conversation or later start shared Cofoundery Matching.
intro.declinedText: This person does not want to continue with the intro right now.
intro.pendingText: Your request is waiting for a response.

matchingPreparation.matchingSessionUnavailable: The matching session is currently unavailable.
matchingPreparation.title: Prepare shared Cofoundery Matching
matchingPreparation.subtitle: You both signaled interest. The next useful step is full Cofoundery Matching, so you can reflect on roles, commitment, working style and expectations together.
matchingPreparation.safetyNote: Nothing is created automatically here: no invitation, no relationship, no report and no workbook.
matchingPreparation.existingContextTitle: There is already an existing Cofoundery context
matchingPreparation.existingContextText: It looks like a matching or connection state already exists for you. To avoid creating duplicates, this preparation page does not start a new process.
matchingPreparation.profilesText: Only details that you intentionally published through Discovery are shown. Email addresses, private search priorities and assessment data stay hidden.

readiness.title: Matching session prepared
readiness.text: Cofoundery created a shared matching context and checked whether your foundation answers are already available. No report, relationship or workbook was created.
readiness.createReportHint: Both foundation answers are available. You can now create a shared dynamics report as an immutable snapshot.

unavailable.title: This matching step is currently unavailable.
unavailable.text: The intro is unavailable, no longer accepted or does not belong to your account. Private details are intentionally not shown here.

states.readyText: You both confirmed that you want to start full Cofoundery Matching. Next, Cofoundery can create a shared matching context and check whether your foundation answers are already available.
states.readyFollowup: Cofoundery creates a shared matching context and checks whether your foundation answers are already available. No report, relationship or workbook is created yet.
states.confirmationRequestedText: The other person still needs to confirm the shared matching start.
states.confirmText: The other person wants to start the full shared matching. Once you confirm, you are ready for the next step.
states.startedText: When you are ready, you can request the shared matching start. The other person then needs to confirm.
states.startText: This lets Cofoundery remember that you want to continue together from this accepted intro. No invitation, relationship, report or workbook is created yet.

steps.bothConfirmed: Both sides have confirmed the shared matching start
steps.awaitingSecondConfirmation: Shared matching start is waiting for the second confirmation
steps.needsBothConfirmations: Full Cofoundery Matching needs confirmation from both sides
steps.startFullMatching: 1. You start the full Cofoundery Matching.
steps.answerQuestions: 2. Both of you answer the relevant Cofoundery questions or confirm existing answers.
steps.reportAndWorkbook: 3. After that, a shared dynamics report is created and you can continue with the workbook.
